meanings.definition: treat differently on the basis of sex or race

examples: I could not discriminate the different tastes in this complicated dish

meanings.definition: showing or indicating careful judgment and discernment especially in matters of taste
examples: the discriminating eye of the connoisseur

meanings.definition: having or demonstrating ability to recognize or draw fine distinctions
examples: an acute observer of politics and politicians
as sharp and incisive as the stroke of a fang
